subcodes.first_line: O Báqir! Bear thou witness in thine own self, thine essence and thy spirit, that the Tree of Sinai hath been raised up in truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا باقر فاشهد فی نفسک و ذاتک و روحک بان شجره الطور قد ارتفعت بالحق فی سنه
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @praise and encouragement, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @knowledge; recognition of God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power of the Manifestation of God
